items.text: The Aviate_Decider component shall maintain an internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts the total number of currently active service requests.
items.fragment: The Aviate_Decider component shall maintain an internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts the total number of currently active service requests.
items.requirement_fragment: The Aviate_Decider component shall maintain an internal variable numberServicesTrue that counts the total number of currently active service requests.

items.text: When the GCAS estimated time of impact (inpGCASImpact) is greater than the ACAS estimated time of impact (inpACASImpact) and the sum of their recovery times (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) ensures no secondary collision occurs, the decision shall be ACAS.
items.fragment: When the GCAS estimated time of impact (inpGCASImpact) is greater than the ACAS estimated time of impact (inpACASImpact) and the sum of their recovery times (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) ensures no secondary collision occurs, the decision shall be ACAS.
items.requirement_fragment: When the GCAS estimated time of impact (inpGCASImpact) is greater than the ACAS estimated time of impact (inpACASImpact) and the sum of their recovery times (inpGCASRecovery + inpACASRecovery) ensures no secondary collision occurs, the decision shall be ACAS.

items.text: Otherwise, the decision shall be GCAS.
items.fragment: Otherwise, the decision shall be GCAS.
items.requirement_fragment: Otherwise, the decision shall be GCAS.

items.text: The final output outDec shall use the dynamic decision result when the value of numberServicesTrue is greater than or equal to 2.
items.fragment: The final output outDec shall use the dynamic decision result when the value of numberServicesTrue is greater than or equal to 2.
items.requirement_fragment: The final output outDec shall use the dynamic decision result when the value of numberServicesTrue is greater than or equal to 2.

items.text: Otherwise, outDec shall fall back to a static priority-based decision.
